title: The revision of the New Legislative Framework – Opportunity for EU competitiveness? [Advocacy Lab]
summary_full: Adopted in 2008, the New Legislative Framework (NLF) establishes a common set of rules, definitions, and procedures that ensure products placed on the EU market are safe, compliant, and reliable, and that their conformity can be verified and trusted. It provides a coherent framework that supports both consumer protection and innovation and ensures fair competition within the […]
